mapper.sql: id, transfer_id, cdate, udate, user_id, user_name, asset_status, asset_parts, remark, status, reason, resp_persion, resp_persion_id, inventory_id, inventory_name
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from asset_transfer_record
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into asset_transfer_record (id, transfer_id, cdate, udate, user_id, user_name, asset_status, asset_parts, remark, status, reason, resp_persion, resp_persion_id, inventory_id, inventory_name ) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{transferId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{assetParts,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{respPersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{respPersionId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{inventoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{inventoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

insert into asset_transfer_record
id,
transfer_id,
cdate,
udate,
user_id,
user_name,
asset_status,
asset_parts,
remark,
status,
reason,
resp_persion,
resp_persion_id,
inventory_id,
inventory_name,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{transferId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{assetStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{assetParts,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{respPersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{respPersionId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{inventoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{inventoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update asset_transfer_record
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
transfer_id = #{record.transferId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cdate = #{record.cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
udate = #{record.udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
user_name = #{record.userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
asset_status = #{record.assetStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
asset_parts = #{record.assetParts,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
reason = #{record.reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
resp_persion = #{record.respPersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
resp_persion_id = #{record.respPersionId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
inventory_id = #{record.inventoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
inventory_name = #{record.inventoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update asset_transfer_record set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, transfer_id = #{record.transferId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cdate = #{record.cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, udate = #{record.udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, user_name = #{record.userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, asset_status = #{record.assetStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, asset_parts = #{record.assetParts,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, reason = #{record.reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, resp_persion = #{record.respPersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, resp_persion_id = #{record.respPersionId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, inventory_id = #{record.inventoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, inventory_name = #{record.inventoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update asset_transfer_record
transfer_id = #{transferId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cdate = #{cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
udate = #{udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
asset_status = #{assetStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
asset_parts = #{assetParts,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
reason = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
resp_persion = #{respPersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
resp_persion_id = #{respPersionId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
inventory_id = #{inventoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
inventory_name = #{inventoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update asset_transfer_record set transfer_id = #{transferId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cdate = #{cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, udate = #{udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, asset_status = #{assetStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, asset_parts = #{assetParts,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, reason = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, resp_persion = #{respPersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, resp_persion_id = #{respPersionId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, inventory_id = #{inventoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, inventory_name = #{inventoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
